title: Yigdalyahuw #3012
definition:
Igdaliah = "Jehovah is great"

 1) a prophet or holy man and father of Hanan in the time of Josiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Igdaliah = "Jehovah is great"

 1) a prophet or holy man and father of Hanan in the time of Josiah

    NASB:  Yah is great, an Isr. prophet
